---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve BigO Lens
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run VS Code extension BigO Lens
2. Open a TS/JS file with '...' code
3. See error or incorrect complexity on the CodeLens

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and terminal output.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or terminal output.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node -v`)
- **npm version:** (run `npm -v`)
- **BigO Lens version:** (check extension sidebar in VS Code)
- **VS Code version:** (run `code --version`)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (e.g., custom config, modified scripts).
